requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport — UN 38.3 and Dangerous Goods

summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries are classified dangerous goods （UN 3480/3481 for lithium-ion, UN 3090/3091 for lithium-metal） and must pass the UN 38.3 test series in the UN Manual of Tests and Criteria before transport, regardless of destination. Because Botswana is landlocked, goods typically arrive by sea at Durban or Walvis Bay and then move overland, so consignments must satisfy IMDG （sea） rules to the port and ADR-aligned road rules for the cross-border leg, plus IATA DGR if any leg is by air. Required documentation commonly includes the UN 38.3 test summary, a dangerous-goods declaration, proper UN packaging/marking/labelling, and a state-of-charge limit for air. UN 38.3 is a transport-safety requirement and is separate from BOBS product conformity.
summary.zh: 锂电芯和电池属危险品（锂离子为UN 3480/3481，锂金属为UN 3090/3091），无论目的地为何，运输前均须通过《联合国试验和标准手册》中的UN 38.3试验系列。由于博茨瓦纳为内陆国，货物通常经海运抵达德班或鲸湾港再陆运，故货件须满足至港口的IMDG（海运）规则及跨境陆运的ADR一致道路规则，若有航段空运还须符合IATA DGR。常见所需文件包括UN 38.3试验摘要、危险品申报、合规的UN包装/标记/标签，以及空运的荷电状态限值。UN 38.3属运输安全要求，与BOBS产品合格评定相互独立。
summary.zht: 鋰電芯和電池屬危險品（鋰離子為UN 3480/3481，鋰金屬為UN 3090/3091），無論目的地為何，運輸前均須通過《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》中的UN 38.3試驗系列。由於波札那為內陸國，貨物通常經海運抵達德班或鯨灣港再陸運，故貨件須滿足至港口的IMDG（海運）規則及跨境陸運的ADR一致道路規則，若有航段空運還須符合IATA DGR。常見所需文件包括UN 38.3試驗摘要、危險品申報、合規的UN包裝/標記/標籤，以及空運的荷電狀態限值。UN 38.3屬運輸安全要求，與BOBS產品合格評定相互獨立。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Section 38.3 (UN 38.3) — lithium battery transport testing
IMDG Code (sea), ADR-aligned road regulations (overland), and IATA DGR (air) for the relevant legs

summary.en: China applies the same UN 38.3 basis: lithium batteries for export are tested to UN 38.3 and shipped under GB 19521 / GB-aligned dangerous-goods rules, with the air mode governed by CAAC rules aligned to IATA DGR. A Chinese UN 38.3 test summary report is internationally portable and is generally the same evidence used for the Botswana logistics chain. The difference is operational （routing via Durban/Walvis Bay and overland）, not a different transport-test standard.
summary.zh: 中国采用相同的UN 38.3基础：出口锂电池按UN 38.3测试，并依GB 19521/与GB一致的危险品规则运输，空运由与IATA DGR一致的CAAC规则管理。中国的UN 38.3试验摘要报告具国际通用性，通常即为博茨瓦纳物流链所用的同一证据。差异在于操作层面（经德班/鲸湾港再陆运），而非不同的运输测试标准。
summary.zht: 中國採用相同的UN 38.3基礎：出口鋰電池按UN 38.3測試，並依GB 19521/與GB一致的危險品規則運輸，空運由與IATA DGR一致的CAAC規則管理。中國的UN 38.3試驗摘要報告具國際通用性，通常即為波札那物流鏈所用的同一證據。差異在於操作層面（經德班/鯨灣港再陸運），而非不同的運輸測試標準。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 (same international transport-test basis as for export)
GB 19521 / CAAC air dangerous-goods rules aligned to IATA DGR (China)

gap.en: Transport testing is the most portable area: a valid UN 38.3 test summary report covers both China export and the Botswana inbound chain. Key practical points: (1) because Botswana is landlocked, the consignment must satisfy IMDG (sea) to Durban or Walvis Bay plus ADR-aligned road rules for the overland leg, and IATA DGR if flown; (2) keep the UN 38.3 summary, dangerous-goods declaration, and correct UN packaging/marking/labelling with the shipment; (3) UN 38.3 is a transport requirement and does NOT replace BOBS product conformity, the BOS import mark, or BOCRA radio approval — those remain separate.
gap.zh: 运输测试是最通用的环节：有效的UN 38.3试验摘要报告同时覆盖中国出口和博茨瓦纳入境链条。要点：（1）因博茨瓦纳为内陆国，货件须满足至德班或鲸湾港的IMDG（海运）及陆运段的ADR一致道路规则，空运则需IATA DGR；（2）随货保留UN 38.3摘要、危险品申报及正确的UN包装/标记/标签；（3）UN 38.3属运输要求，不能替代BOBS产品合格评定、BOS进口标志或BOCRA无线电核准——三者仍相互独立。
gap.zht: 運輸測試是最通用的環節：有效的UN 38.3試驗摘要報告同時覆蓋中國出口和波札那入境鏈條。要點：（1）因波札那為內陸國，貨件須滿足至德班或鯨灣港的IMDG（海運）及陸運段的ADR一致道路規則，空運則需IATA DGR；（2）隨貨保留UN 38.3摘要、危險品申報及正確的UN包裝/標記/標籤；（3）UN 38.3屬運輸要求，不能替代BOBS產品合格評定、BOS進口標誌或BOCRA無線電核准——三者仍相互獨立。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for transport — UN 38.3 plus IMDG/ADR-aligned/IATA DGR rules apply to lithium-battery consignments into Botswana via the sea-then-overland chain
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export transport — UN 38.3 and GB/CAAC dangerous-goods rules apply to lithium batteries shipped from China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Lithium-battery transport into Botswana relies on the same international UN 38.3 basis used for China export, so a valid UN 38.3 test summary is largely portable; consignments must additionally meet IMDG (sea to Durban/Walvis Bay), ADR-aligned road rules overland, and IATA DGR if flown. UN 38.3 covers transport safety only and does not satisfy BOBS product conformity or BOCRA radio approval, which remain separate.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入博茨瓦纳的锂电池运输依赖与中国出口相同的国际UN 38.3基础，因此有效的UN 38.3试验摘要基本通用；货件还须满足IMDG（海运至德班/鲸湾港）、陆运ADR一致道路规则，空运则需IATA DGR。UN 38.3仅涉及运输安全，不能满足BOBS产品合格评定或BOCRA无线电核准，二者仍相互独立。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入波札那的鋰電池運輸依賴與中國出口相同的國際UN 38.3基礎，因此有效的UN 38.3試驗摘要基本通用；貨件還須滿足IMDG（海運至德班/鯨灣港）、陸運ADR一致道路規則，空運則需IATA DGR。UN 38.3僅涉及運輸安全，不能滿足BOBS產品合格評定或BOCRA無線電核准，二者仍相互獨立。

source.publisher: UNECE — UN Manual of Tests and Criteria (UN 38.3)
